title: Kinesis Data Streams
description: Architect high-throughput real-time data ingestion pipelines using Kinesis Data Streams. Implement strategies for managing shard scaling and consumer-checkpointing in Kinesis applications.
objectives: Architect high-throughput real-time data ingestion pipelines using Kinesis Data Streams.
Implement strategies for managing shard scaling and consumer-checkpointing in Kinesis applications.
